terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.subtitle: The rules for using the Cyna platform.
terms.s1_body: These Terms of Use govern your access to and use of the CYNA website, mobile application, and SaaS cybersecurity services. By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the platform.
terms.s2_body: CYNA provides SaaS cybersecurity solutions (SOC, EDR, XDR, etc.) through subscription plans. Detailed features, SLAs, and pricing are described on the product pages and/or in the specific order confirmation.
terms.s3_body: You must create an account to purchase services. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your credentials and for all activities under your account. Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.
terms.s4_body: Subscriptions are billed monthly or annually and renew automatically unless canceled before the renewal date via your account. All payments are processed securely via our payment provider. Prices are in EUR, exclusive and inclusive of applicable taxes.
terms.s5_body: All content, software, trademarks, and services on the platform are owned by CYNA or its licensors. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or create derivative works without our prior written consent.
terms.s6_body: CYNA provides services "as is". We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid in the 12 months preceding the claim.
terms.s7_body: You may cancel your subscription at any time (effective at the end of the current billing period). We may suspend or terminate your access for non-payment, violation of these terms, or security reasons.
terms.s8_body: These terms are governed by French law. Any dispute shall be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Paris, France, after an attempt at amicable resolution.
terms.s9_body: We may update these Terms of Use. Significant changes will be notified by email or in-app notice. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
terms.address: CYNA-IT – 10 rue de Penthièvre, 75008 Paris, France

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect and protect your data.
privacy.s1_body: CYNA takes your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, store, and protect your personal data when you use our website, mobile application, and SaaS cybersecurity services (SOC, EDR, XDR, etc.). This policy complies with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR – Regulation (EU) 2016/679) and other applicable data protection laws.
privacy.s3_intro: We collect the following categories of personal data:
privacy.s3_identity: Identity & contact data: name, email, phone, company name
privacy.s3_billing: Billing & payment data: billing address, payment method details (tokenized via our payment provider – we do not store full card numbers)
privacy.s3_account: Account data: login credentials (hashed), subscription details
privacy.s3_usage: Usage & technical data: IP address, browser type, device information, connection logs, pages visited
privacy.s3_transaction: Transaction data: order history, purchased SaaS plans, invoices
privacy.s3_cookies: Cookies & trackers: strictly necessary cookies, functional cookies, analytics cookies (with consent)
privacy.s3_sensitive: We do not collect sensitive data (health, political opinions, religion, etc.) unless you voluntarily provide it (e.g. in support messages).
privacy.s4_intro: Your data is processed for the following purposes and legal bases:
privacy.s4_contract: Performance of the contract: account creation, order processing, subscription management, service delivery (SaaS access)
privacy.s4_legitimate: Legitimate interest: fraud prevention, security (cybersecurity logs), service improvement (anonymized analytics)
privacy.s4_legal: Legal obligation: invoicing, accounting, tax compliance
privacy.s5_intro: Your data may be shared with:
privacy.s5_hosting: Cloud hosting provider (EU-based or with GDPR safeguards)
privacy.s5_providers: Email & analytics service providers (with DPA – Data Processing Agreements)
privacy.s5_authorities: Competent authorities when required by law
privacy.s5_no_sell: We never sell your personal data.
privacy.s6_active: Active account & transaction data: duration of the contractual relationship + 5 years (legal prescription)
privacy.s6_deleted: Deleted account: data permanently erased within 30 days (except legal retention obligations)
privacy.s7_erase: Erase your data ("right to be forgotten")
privacy.s7_contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at
privacy.s7_response: . We will respond within one month.
privacy.s7_cnil: You can also lodge a complaint with the CNIL:
privacy.s8_body: We implement state-of-the-art security measures aligned with our cybersecurity expertise: TLS encryption in transit, encryption at rest, access controls, regular security audits, EDR/XDR monitoring, and incident response procedures. In case of a personal data breach, we will notify the competent supervisory authority and affected individuals within 72 hours when required.
privacy.s9_body: We use strictly necessary cookies for authentication and site functionality. Analytics and marketing cookies are only placed with your explicit consent via our cookie banner. You can manage your preferences at any time.
privacy.s10_body: We may update this Privacy Policy. Material changes will be notified by email or prominent notice on the platform. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.

about.title: About Cyna
about.subtitle: Your cybersecurity-as-a-service partner
about.mission_body: Cyna's mission is to make enterprise-grade cybersecurity accessible to every organization. We design and operate managed services that protect your systems, data and users against constantly evolving threats.
about.offer_intro: We offer a full range of subscription-based cybersecurity services:
about.offer_soc: Managed SOC — 24/7 monitoring and incident response.
about.offer_xdr: XDR — extended, correlated detection across your information system.
about.offer_audit: Audits and penetration testing to assess your risk exposure.
about.values_trust: Trust — full transparency on our practices and the protection of your data.
about.values_expertise: Expertise — certified teams and continuous threat intelligence.
about.contact_body: A question about our services or a specific need? Reach us through our

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: How cookies are used on our site.
cookies.s1_body: This Cookie Policy explains how CYNA uses cookies and similar technologies on our website, mobile application, and SaaS platform. Cookies are small text files placed on your device to help provide a better user experience, analyze usage, and enable certain functionalities. We comply with the EU GDPR, the ePrivacy Directive, and CNIL guidelines (updated 2025-2026). This policy supplements our
cookies.s2_title: 2. What Are Cookies and Similar Technologies?
cookies.s2_body: Cookies are small data files stored on your browser or device. Similar technologies include pixels, web beacons, local storage, and device fingerprinting. They can be session cookies (deleted when you close your browser) or persistent cookies (remain until expiration or deletion).
cookies.s3_intro: We classify cookies into the following categories:
cookies.s3_necessary: Strictly Necessary Cookies (no consent required): Essential for site operation, such as authentication, session management, security, shopping cart functionality, and language preferences. These are exempt from consent under Article 82 of the French Data Protection Act.
cookies.s3_functional: Functional Cookies (consent optional): Remember user choices (e.g., dark mode, viewed products), enable live chat support, and improve navigation.
cookies.s3_analytics: Performance / Analytics Cookies (consent required): Measure site performance, visitor numbers, popular pages, and user journeys. Data is aggregated and anonymized where possible.
cookies.s3_advertising: Advertising / Marketing Cookies (consent required): Deliver personalized ads, retargeting, and track marketing campaign effectiveness. We do not use intrusive behavioral advertising by default.
cookies.s3_third_party: Third-Party Cookies: From partners such as payment providers (Stripe), analytics tools, social media plugins. We only enable them with your consent.
cookies.s4_intro: We use a cookie consent banner on first visit. You can:
cookies.s4_customize: Customize your preferences (granular choices per category)
cookies.s4_note: Consent is freely given, specific, informed, and unambiguous. Refusal is as easy as acceptance. You can withdraw or change consent at any time via the footer link ("Cookie Preferences") or by clearing browser cookies.
cookies.s5_browser: Your browser settings (Chrome, Firefox, Safari – block third-party cookies, private browsing)
cookies.s5_gpc: Tools like Global Privacy Control (GPC) signals (honored where applicable)
cookies.s5_note: Note: Blocking necessary cookies may prevent site functionality (e.g., login, checkout).
cookies.s6_body: Some cookies involve third parties (e.g., Google Analytics, Stripe, social networks). These may transfer data outside the EU/EEA. Transfers are safeguarded by Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs), adequacy decisions, or other GDPR mechanisms.
cookies.s7_body: We may update this Cookie Policy to reflect changes in technology, law, or our practices. Material changes will be notified via email, in-app notice, or updated banner. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
cookies.s8_body: For questions about cookies or to exercise your rights:
cookies.address: CYNA-IT – 10 rue de Penthièvre, 75008 Paris, France

chatbot.title: Cyna Assistant
chatbot.subtitle: Online instant reply
chatbot.welcome: Hello! I'm the Cyna assistant. Select a question below and I'll answer instantly.
chatbot.q4: How do I subscribe to a solution?
chatbot.q5: How do I cancel my subscription?
chatbot.q8: Do you offer a free trial?
chatbot.a1: Our SOC (Security Operations Center) monitors your infrastructure 24/7. Expert analysts detect, analyze, and respond to security incidents in real time, dramatically reducing your threat response time.
chatbot.a2: EDR (Endpoint Detection & Response) protects every workstation and server against advanced threats using AI. XDR (Extended Detection & Response) provides a unified view by correlating data across your entire infrastructure endpoints, network, and cloud.
chatbot.a3: Our support team is available 24/7. You can reach us via the contact form on the website, by email at support@cyna-it.fr, or directly from your customer portal under the "Support" section.
chatbot.a4: To subscribe, browse our product catalog, add your solution to the cart, and complete your order in a few clicks. Your access is activated immediately after payment confirmation.
chatbot.a5: You can cancel your subscription at any time from your customer portal under "Subscriptions". Cancellation takes effect at the end of your current billing period, with no additional fees.
chatbot.a6: Absolutely. We apply the strictest security standards: TLS encryption in transit, EU-hosted data, GDPR compliance, and we protect our own infrastructure with our EDR/XDR technologies. Your security is our priority.
chatbot.a7: Our pricing is displayed directly on each product page (monthly or annually). For a custom quote or enterprise plans with specific requirements, contact us via the contact form.
chatbot.a8: Some of our solutions include an evaluation period. Contact our sales team via the contact form to discuss trial options tailored to the size and needs of your organization.
